ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips" REAL /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the county belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the zip code belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the zip code belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the zip code belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the demographic data belongs to */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zip code */,
  "population_age_12_and_up" INTEGER /* Population aged 12 and up in the zip code */,
  "population_age_18_and_up" INTEGER /* Population aged 18 and up in the zip code */,
  "population_age_65_and_up" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 and up in the zip code */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population in the zip code */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population in the zip code */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age in the zip code */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_demographics_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the vaccination data belongs to */,
  "number_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated in the zip code */,
  "percent_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 12 and up vaccinated in the zip code */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated in the zip code */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people partially vaccinated in the zip code */,
  "booster_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people booster vaccinated in the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_vulnerability_indices" (
  "svi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social vulnerability index entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the social vulnerability index belongs to */,
  "svi_score" REAL /* Social vulnerability index score for the zip code */,
  "theme1" REAL /* Theme 1 score for the zip code */,
  "theme2" REAL /* Theme 2 score for the zip code */,
  "theme3" REAL /* Theme 3 score for the zip code */,
  "theme4" REAL /* Theme 4 score for the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("svi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_vulnerability_indices_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic coordinate entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the geographic coordinate belongs to */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the zip code */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_coordinates_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the vaccination center is located in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vaccination center */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination appointment */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination center the appointment is at */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine being administered */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query executed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the test result belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_administrations" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine administration */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination center the vaccine was administered at */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine being administered */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of administration */,
  "number_administered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "vaccinated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person administering the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administrations_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administrations_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine inventory entry */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination center the vaccine is stored at */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccine in stock */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_inventories_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_inventories_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "user" TEXT /* Author of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)
